div.p: desc: |md ### UNINITIALIZED POOL Base Address: 0x1000 Total Size: 320 Bytes State: Raw allocated buffer before threading logic.
logic_annotation: |md Algorithm: 1. ptr = base 2. for i in 0..N-1: 3. *ptr = (ptr + 64) 4. ptr += 64 5. *ptr = NULL | { style.font-size: 12 } }
desc: |md ### INITIALIZED STATE Each block's leading 8-bytes now contains the memory address of the subsequent block.
